title: TS SSC Result 2026 (Out): Telangana Class 10 results declared, overall pass percentage at 95.15 per cent
description: TS SSC Result 2026: The Telangana Class 10 results have been declared. The results are out on results.bsetelangana.org. A total of 95.15 per cent of the 5,16,815 regular students who took the examinations passed them.
